'''Lethe Merchandising''' was the largest member company of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]]. [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] was chairman of the company, as well as being [[Magistrate/Legends|Magistrate]] of the Corporate Alliance.

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
